Phase-9.NAME: Critical Security Fixes (P1)
Phase-9.goal: Eliminate critical security vulnerabilities in deployment and runtime defaults.
Phase-9.step-1: M-001: Block default secret_key startup with ValueError.
Phase-9.step-2: M-001/M-027: Require explicit DATA_ENCRYPTION_KEY, remove JWT-secret fallback.
Phase-9.step-3: M-006: Fix auth bypass in admin_users_router.
Phase-9.step-4: M-012: Remove sshpass from deploy scripts.
Phase-9.step-5: M-012: Remove base64 encoding of secrets.
Phase-9.step-6: M-012: Remove plaintext credential file creation.
Phase-9.step-8: M-012: Remove port 8000 external mapping from docker-compose.
